data: The following lawyers are currently part of our firm:
data.cándido-quintana-núñez#Cándido Quintana: Col. 1.178 ICA Burgos ES · EN Degree in Laws from the University of Valladolid, with over 40 years of solid experience in legal practice, particularly in Civil, Criminal, Labor, and Administrative Law.
data.pablo-quintana-jabato#Pablo Quintana Jab:
Col. 3.308 ICA Burgos ES · EN · FR Degree in Law from the University of Navarra, where he received awards and distinctions for his academic performance. He combines his excellent education with experience, especially (but not exclusively) in Criminal Law. He is a member of the Spanish Association of Family Lawyers.

data.1-collected-data-and-purpose#1. Collecte:
As mentioned in the previous section, this website does not store cookies or collect any user data.
However, notwithstanding the above, Quintana Abogados may require certain personal data — primarily name, surname, contact phone number, and email address — either through the contact form on this website or in the course of professional activity.
The purpose of the collected data is to communicate with the client or website user in the strict context of the legal services provided by the professionals at K Abogados. In this regard, the data will be kept for as long as necessary to carry out the assigned tasks.
data.2-data-controller#2. Data controller:
QUINTANA NÚÑEZ Y QUINTANA JABATO ABOGADOS, SCP
c/ Santander 11, 2º C (09004 - Burgos)
data.3-clients-and-web-users-rights#3. Client: You may exercise your rights of access, rectification, cancellation, opposition, and limitation of processing by submitting a written request to the company at the address provided in the previous section.
data.cookies#Cookies: This website has been designed with respect for your privacy, so it does not store any type of cookies.

data: At Quintana Abogados, we offer services in the following areas
data.administrative-law#ADMINISTRATIVE LAW:
Advice and defense before the Administration and in judicial proceedings in the Administrative Jurisdiction.
Contact us
data.civil-law#CIVIL LAW: Advice and defense in other civil matters: inheritances, leases, evictions, claims for amounts, etc.
data.criminal-law#CRIMINAL LAW: Defense, assistance, and intervention in all types of criminal procedures and against all types of crimes.
data.family-law#FAMILY LAW: Advice and defense in family matters: divorces, adoption of measures regarding minor children, alimony, etc.
data.labor-law#LABOR LAW: Advice and defense in individual labor matters and before Social Security: dismissals, claims for amounts, permanent disability procedures, etc.
